DP.154.0000:
Hey, there!
How’s it going, Champ-to-be?\f
Let me check out your Trainer Case.
Let’s see how many Badges you have.\f
One, two, three...
Whoa! Wow! You’ve already got seven!\f
That means if you can beat this Gym
Leader, you’re on your way to the\r
Pokémon League next.\f
That also means this is the last time
I get to give you advice.\f
This is it, kiddo!
Listen carefully...one last time!\f
The Gym Leader here is a master of
Electric-type Pokémon!\f
That’s all I have to say.
The rest is up to you!
DP.154.0001:
Oh! [0103,0000]!
Did you beat the Gym Leader?\r
Well, of course you did!\f
But, you know what?
You haven’t made it in my mind yet!\f
Do you know why?\f
Because you and your Pokémon are
capable of achieving so much more!\f
But, I am proud of you!
Eight Sinnoh Badges!\r
Way to go, kiddo!
